name: menu-cart-drawer
title: Lumelle Menu/Cart Drawer System
description: Mobile-first side drawer with a Menu/Cart tab toggle. Menu tab shows a product rail with pill badges and MORE section. Cart tab shows line items with quantity dropdowns, volume discount tiers, free-shipping progress bar, and Shopify checkout handoff.

preview.reason: Imports app-specific providers (auth, cart, product data) that can't be mocked in isolation. Preserved as code-reference.
